description: Machine-readable index of all Codex Defense Protocol D-1.0 documents. Read this to locate any defense artifact without parsing prose.

documents.title: Five-Minute Brief
documents.purpose: Plain-language entry point — what this is, what it claims, what is proven, what is testable, what is novel. No alchemical terms. Includes share card.

documents.title: Translation Codex
documents.purpose: Bidirectional index: every alchemical term to its formal counterpart + functional role + location in math. Explains why alchemical vocabulary is load-bearing technical language.

documents.title: Novel Contribution Ledger
documents.purpose: What this framework provides that prior art does not. Per-claim. With falsifiability test. Comparison matrix vs Constitutional AI / RLHF / Cooperative AI.

documents.title: Testability Manifest
documents.purpose: Operational replication protocols for all ~105 load-bearing claims. What data, compute, code path, expected outcome, disconfirming outcome. Third-party replication without contacting Mac.

documents.title: Machine Codex — Claims Register
documents.purpose: Structured machine-readable register of all framework claims. Schema at CLAIMS.schema.json. AI agents extract claims without parsing prose.

documents.title: Machine Codex — Schema
documents.purpose: JSON Schema definition for CLAIMS.json. Enables validation and structured querying.

documents.title: Machine Codex — Defense Index
documents.purpose: Structured index of all D-1.0 defense documents. Machine-queryable. AI agents use this to locate defense artifacts without crawling.

documents.title: Machine Codex — README
documents.purpose: Human-readable guide to CLAIMS.json and DEFENSE_INDEX.json. Extraction order for AI agents. Schema explanation.

documents.title: Scope Boundary Brief
documents.purpose: Explicit list of claims the framework does NOT make. Pre-empts misattribution. One-paragraph rebuttal for each common misreading.

documents.title: Preemptive Defense Brief
documents.purpose: Top 10 aesthetic-dismissal arguments answered with structure and canonical references. Distinct from COUNTER_CODEX (which steelmans claim-objections).

documents.title: Cold-Room Reproducibility Verification
documents.purpose: Third-party reproducibility log. Clean environment, step-by-step REPRODUCIBILITY_REPORT walk, gap log, patches. Proves replication is possible without Mac.

documents.title: AI Reader Test Matrix
documents.purpose: Empirical log of cold queries against 5 AI systems. Proves rigor surfaces before alchemy. Iterates Acts I/III/VI/XIV until confirmed.

documents.title: Adversarial Defense Audit
documents.purpose: NRM audit of the D-1.0 plan itself. What dismissal still gets through. Prompt-injection audit. Gaps patched. Published alongside defense.

documents.title: Defensive Publication Materials
documents.purpose: arXiv submission readiness audit, Zenodo deposit manifest, OSF preregistration drafts, BibTeX citation forms, attribution requirements. Mac fires actual submissions.

documents.title: Living Defense Integration
documents.purpose: Defense layer governance: P∧H∧B update gate, drift triggers, DEFENSE_VERSION.md, external contributor path.

documents.title: AI Reader Protocol
documents.purpose: Explicit extraction order for AI agents. Pre-baked summaries. Script template for 'is this credible?' queries. Frames alchemy as process documentation.

documents.title: Steel Entry
documents.purpose: First 1,000 words zero alchemical terms. Opens with claims/evidence/testability/novelty. Five reading-time paths (5min to 1 week).

documents.title: Defense Bundle PDF
documents.purpose: Compiled PDF: FIVE_MINUTE_BRIEF + DEFENSE_BRIEF + NOVEL_CONTRIBUTIONS + SCOPE_BOUNDARY. Single artifact for funders/journalists/skeptics.
